description: Chat with a local LM Studio model right inside a CodeTerm pane. An open agent shell: native LM Studio v1 streaming, presets, visible system prompt, and CodeTerm tool execution.
configHelp: LM Studio turns a CodeTerm pane into an open agent shell. It uses LM Studio native v1 endpoints: POST /api/v1/chat for stateful streaming chat and GET /api/v1/models for model discovery. To use it: in LM Studio load a model and Developer tab → Start Server (defaults to http://localhost:1234). Knobs (set with `codeterm plugin config lmstudio --set key=value` or edit config.yaml): `baseUrl` — server base URL; `model` — fallback model id; `defaultPreset` — fallback preset id; `presets` — array of {id,name,systemPrompt?,model?,params?}. A preset with `model` binds to that exact model id and is selected before an explicit preset request. Watcher mode: spawn with `codeterm agent spawn lmstudio --role Watcher --parent <orch> --charter charter:watcher-orchestration --interval 90s` (read-only; host tick loop). `charters` — map of named watcher charter bodies; reference at spawn with `--charter charter:<id>`. Canonical template: prompts/watcher-orchestration.md. Verdict JSON: {status: ok|attention|stalled, summary, state, actions:[{kind:nudge|notify|report, pane?, message}]}. Chat engine: optional `engine: { kind: chat, window: { maxMessages } }` bounds history; `engine: { kind: machine, charter }` is a state machine (watcher or interactive).
